<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>WinnerFlow</title>
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icon.png">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="icon.png">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Syne:wght@700;800;900&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
:root{
 --green:#00d97e;--green-dim:rgba(0,217,126,0.12);--green-glow:rgba(0,217,126,0.25);
 --red:#ff4d6d;--amber:#ffb800;
 --bg:#07090f;--surface:#0d1117;--card:#131b27;--card2:#1a2332;
 --border:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--border2:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
 --text:#f0f4ff;--muted:#5a6a8a;--muted2:#3a4a65;
 --fs:16px;
}
html{font-size:var(--fs)}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
 min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;padding-bottom:80px}

/* BG texture */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;
 background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% -20%,rgba(0,217,126,0.06),transparent),
            radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 80% 80%,rgba(99,102,241,0.05),transparent);
 pointer-events:none;z-index:0}

/* ===== 底部導航 ===== */
.nav{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
 background:rgba(7,9,15,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
 border-top:1px solid var(--border);
 display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);padding:8px 0 max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
.nav-btn{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;
 border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;padding:6px 4px;
 color:var(--muted);transition:.2s;position:relative}
.nav-btn.active{color:var(--green)}
.nav-btn svg{width:22px;height:22px;stroke-width:1.8}
.nav-btn span{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.02em}
.nav-btn.active::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
 width:32px;height:2px;background:var(--green);border-radius:0 0 4px 4px}

/* ===== 頁面 ===== */
.page{display:none;min-height:calc(100vh - 80px);padding:0;animation:fadeUp .2s ease}
.page.active{display:block}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ===== 首頁 Header ===== */
.home-header{padding:20px 20px 0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.brand{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.brand span{color:var(--green)}
.header-actions{display:flex;gap:8px}
.icon-btn{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--card);
 border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
 cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);transition:.2s}
.icon-btn:hover,.icon-btn:active{color:var(--text);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15)}
.icon-btn svg{width:17px;height:17px;stroke-width:2}

/* ===== 資產英雄區 ===== */
.hero{padding:28px 20px 20px;text-align:center;position:relative}
.hero-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px}
.hero-value{
 font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;
 font-size:clamp(24px, 9vw, 40px); /* 調降上限，適應長數字 */
 font-weight:900;
 line-height:1.1;
 width:100%;
 word-break: break-word; /* 徹底解除截斷，數字太長自然換行或縮放 */
 background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 0%,var(--green) 100%);
 -webkit-background-clip:text;
 -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
 margin-bottom:8px;
}
.hero-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}
.badge-up{color:var(--green);background:var(--green-dim);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}
.badge-down{color:var(--red);background:rgba(255,77,109,0.12);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}

/* ===== 大盤快訊 ===== */
.ticker-wrap{overflow:hidden;padding:12px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--surface)}
.ticker-inner{display:flex;gap:24px;animation:ticker 25s linear infinite;width:max-content}
@keyframes ticker{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.ticker-item{white-space:nowrap;font-size:12px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:var(--muted);display:flex;gap:6px}
.ticker-item .t-name{color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
.t-up{color:var(--green)}.t-dn{color:var(--red)}

/* ===== 卡片 ===== */
.cards{padding:16px 20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden}
.card-header{padding:16px 20px 12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.card-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}
.card-action{font-size:12px;color:var(--green);font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}
.card-body{padding:0 20px 20px}

/* 2欄 stat */
.stat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.stat-box{background:var(--card2);border-radius:14px;padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--border2)}
.stat-box .s-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.stat-box .s-val{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:20px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.stat-box .s-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px}
.stat-box.green .s-val{color:var(--green)}
.stat-box.red .s-val{color:var(--red)}

/* margin bar */
.margin-bar-wrap{padding:0 20px 16px}
.margin-bar-labels{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px}
.margin-bar-track{height:6px;background:var(--card2);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}
.margin-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width .5s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}

/* 圖表 */
.chart-wrap{height:120px;padding:0 20px 16px;position:relative}

/* ===== 輸入區 ===== */
.input-section{padding:16px 20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.input-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.input-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.input-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase}
.inp{background:var(--card2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
 color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:18px;font-weight:500;
 padding:12px 14px;width:100%;outline:none;transition:.15s;text-align:right;-webkit-appearance:none}
.inp:focus{border-color:var(--green);background:#0f1a24}
.inp::placeholder{color:var(--muted2)}
input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none}
.inp-full{grid-column:1/-1;font-size:24px;text-align:center}
.inp-note{grid-column:1/-1;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-align:right;margin-top:-4px}

/* slider */
.slider-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.slider-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.slider-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
.slider-val{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:14px;color:var(--green);font-weight:500}
input[type=range]{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:36px;background:transparent}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track{background:var(--card2);height:4px;border-radius:2px}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:20px;height:20px;
 border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);margin-top:-8px;border:2.5px solid var(--bg);
 box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--green-dim)}

/* ===== 股票追蹤 ===== */
.page-header{padding:24px 20px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start}
.page-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.1}
.page-subtitle{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}
.add-fab{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:14px;background:var(--green);
 display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;border:none;
 box-shadow:0 4px 16px var(--green-glow);transition:.15s}
.add-fab:active{transform:scale(0.93)}
.add-fab svg{width:20px;height:20px;stroke:#07090f;stroke-width:2.5}

/* stock item */
.stock-item{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;
 padding:16px;margin:0 20px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;
 transition:.15s;cursor:pointer}
.stock-item:active{background:var(--card2)}
.stock-avatar{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--card2);
 display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
 font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
.stock-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.stock-code{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.stock-name{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.stock-right{text-align:right;flex-shrink:0}
.stock-roi{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:16px;font-weight:500}
.stock-profit{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}
.roi-pos{color:var(--green)}.roi-neg{color:var(--red)}

/* dropdown */
.drop-sheet{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);align-items:flex-end}
.drop-sheet.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.drop-inner{background:#131b27;border-radius:24px 24px 0 0;width:100%;max-height:70vh;
 border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-bottom:env(safe-area-inset-bottom)}
.drop-handle{width:40px;height:4px;background:var(--muted2);border-radius:2px;margin:12px auto 4px}
.drop-search{margin:8px 16px 4px;background:var(--card2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);
 border-radius:12px;padding:12px 16px;color:var(--text);font-size:15px;width:calc(100% - 32px);
 outline:none;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif}
.drop-search:focus{border-color:var(--green)}
.drop-list{overflow-y:auto;max-height:calc(70vh - 120px)}
.drop-item{padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);transition:.1s}
.drop-item:active{background:var(--card2)}
.drop-item-code{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500;min-width:60px}
.drop-item-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)}
.drop-item-type{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--card2);color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.04em}

/* add form sheet */
.form-sheet{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);align-items:flex-end}
.form-sheet.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s}
.form-inner{background:#131b27;border-radius:24px 24px 0 0;width:100%;padding:0 20px 32px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.form-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;padding:20px 0 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.form-close{color:var(--muted);font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;background:none;border:none}
.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
.form-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;display:block}
.form-inp{background:var(--card2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
 color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:18px;font-weight:500;
 padding:12px 14px;width:100%;outline:none;text-align:right}
.form-inp:focus{border-color:var(--green)}
input[type=number].form-inp::-webkit-inner-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none}
.form-inp-lg{grid-column:1/-1;font-size:15px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;text-align:left;padding:13px 14px}
.btn-primary{width:100%;padding:16px;background:var(--green);color:#07090f;font-weight:800;
 font-size:16px;border:none;border-radius:16px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;
 letter-spacing:.02em;transition:.15s;box-shadow:0 4px 20px var(--green-glow)}
.btn-primary:active{transform:scale(0.98);opacity:.9}
.btn-danger{background:rgba(255,77,109,0.12);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(255,77,109,0.2)}

/* ===== 新聞 ===== */
.news-filter{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:0 20px 16px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.news-chip{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;
 border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;
 white-space:nowrap;transition:.15s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif}
.news-chip.active{background:var(--green-dim);border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green)}
.news-item{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);cursor:pointer;transition:.1s;display:flex;gap:12px}
.news-item:active{background:var(--card2)}
.news-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:5px}
.dot-tw{background:var(--green)}.dot-us{background:#6366f1}.dot-fx{background:var(--amber)}
.news-content{flex:1;min-width:0}
.news-title{font-size:14px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.4;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:4px}
.news-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}

/* ===== 工具 ===== */
.tool-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;padding:0 20px}
.tool-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;
 padding:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.tool-card:active{background:var(--card2);transform:scale(0.98)}
.tool-icon{font-size:28px;line-height:1}
.tool-name{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text)}
.tool-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4}

/* ===== 工具詳細面板 ===== */
.tool-panel{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:150;background:var(--bg);overflow-y:auto;padding-bottom:40px;animation:slideUp .25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.tool-panel.open{display:block}
@keyframes slideUp{from{transform:translateY(100%)}to{transform:translateY(0)}}
.panel-header{padding:20px 20px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:10;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)}
.panel-back{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0}
.panel-back svg{width:16px;height:16px;stroke:var(--muted);stroke-width:2.5}
.panel-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:900}
.panel-body{padding:20px}

/* 結果卡 */
.result-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
.result-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.result-val{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:28px;font-weight:500;color:var(--green)}
.result-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}
.result-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}
.result-mini{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px}
.result-mini .r-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase}
.result-mini .r-val{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:20px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500}

/* 匯率行 */
.fx-row{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)}
.fx-row:last-child{border:none}
.fx-flag{font-size:22px;width:32px;flex-shrink:0}
.fx-info{flex:1}
.fx-code{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
.fx-name{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.fx-amount{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:18px;color:var(--green);font-weight:500}

/* 停損停利 */
.alert-item{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.alert-color{width:4px;height:44px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.alert-info{flex:1}
.alert-code{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.alert-levels{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px}

/* 筆記 */
.note-item{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;margin:0 0 10px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px}
.note-pin{color:var(--amber);flex-shrink:0;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;padding-top:2px}
.note-pin.off{color:var(--muted2)}
.note-text{flex:1;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);line-height:1.5}
.note-time{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}
.note-del{color:var(--muted2);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;background:none;border:none;padding:0}

/* 歷史 */
.hist-item{background:var(--card);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;gap:12px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.hist-line{width:3px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0;align-self:stretch}
.hist-content{flex:1}
.hist-time{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px}
.hist-main{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--text)}
.hist-roi{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px}

/* toast */
#toast{position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-80px);
 background:var(--green);color:#07090f;padding:10px 22px;border-radius:20px;
 font-weight:700;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;transition:transform .3s;pointer-events:none;
 white-space:nowrap;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;box-shadow:0 4px 20px var(--green-glow)}
#toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}

/* chart wrapper */
canvas{display:block}

/* empty state */
.empty{text-align:center;padding:48px 20px;color:var(--muted)}
.empty-icon{font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:.5}
.empty-text{font-size:14px}

/* section divider */
.section-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:16px 20px 8px}

/* settings */
.setting-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)}
.setting-left .s-title{font-size:15px;color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
.setting-left .s-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}
.toggle{width:48px;height:26px;background:var(--muted2);border-radius:13px;
 cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:.25s;border:none;flex-shrink:0}
.toggle.on{background:var(--green)}
.toggle::after{content:'';position:absolute;width:20px;height:20px;background:#fff;
 border-radius:50%;top:3px;left:3px;transition:.25s;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.toggle.on::after{left:25px}
.size-btns{display:flex;gap:6px}
.size-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);
 background:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif}
.size-btn.active{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green);background:var(--green-dim)}
.theme-dots{display:flex;gap:10px}
.t-dot{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:3px solid transparent;transition:.2s}
.t-dot.active{border-color:#fff;transform:scale(1.15)}

/* 動態 */
.pulse{animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.5}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="toast"></div>

<nav class="nav">
 <button class="nav-btn active" onclick="goPage('home',this)">
   <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"/></svg>
   <span>首頁</span>
 </button>
 <button class="nav-btn" onclick="goPage('watch',this)">
   <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 19v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2zm0 0V9a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2v10m-6 0a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2m0 0V5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2v14a2 2 0 01-2 2h-2a2 2 0 01-2-2z"/></svg>
   <span>追蹤</span>
 </button>
 <button class="nav-btn" onclick="goPage('news',this)">
   <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19 20H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h10a2 2 0 012 2v1m2 13a2 2 0 01-2-2V7m2 13a2 2 0 002-2V9a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2m-4-3H9M7 16h6M7 8h6v4H7V8z"/></svg>
   <span>新聞</span>
 </button>
 <button class="nav-btn" onclick="goPage('tools',this)">
   <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6V4m0 2a2 2 0 100 4m0-4a2 2 0 110 4m-6 8a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4m6 6v10m6-2a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4"/></svg>
   <span>工具</span>
 </button>
 <button class="nav-btn" onclick="goPage('settings',this)">
   <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"/></svg>
   <span>我的</span>
 </button>
</nav>

<div id="page-home" class="page active">
 <div class="home-header">
   <div class="brand">Winner<span>Flow</span></div>
   <div class="header-actions">
     <div class="icon-btn" onclick="syncMarket()" id="sync-btn" title="同步">
       <svg id="sync-icon" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 4v5h.582m15.356 2A8.001 8.001 0 004.582 9m0 0H9m11 11v-5h-.581m0 0a8.003 8.003 0 01-15.357-2m15.357 2H15"/></svg>
     </div>
     <div class="icon-btn" onclick="goPage('settings', document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn')[4])" title="設定">
       <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.325 4.317c.426-1.756 2.924-1.756 3.35 0a1.724 1.724 0 002.573 1.066c1.543-.94 3.31.826 2.37 2.37a1.724 1.724 0 001.065 2.572c1.756.426 1.756 2.924 0 3.35a1.724 1.724 0 00-1.066 2.573c.94 1.543-.826 3.31-2.37 2.37a1.724 1.724 0 00-2.572 1.065c-.426 1.756-2.924 1.756-3.35 0a1.724 1.724 0 00-2.573-1.066c-1.543.94-3.31-.826-2.37-2.37a1.724 1.724 0 00-1.065-2.572c-1.756-.426-1.756-2.924 0-3.35a1.724 1.724 0 001.066-2.573c-.94-1.543.826-3.31 2.37-2.37.996.608 2.296.07 2.572-1.065z"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 12a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"/></svg>
     </div>
   </div>
 </div>

 <div class="hero">
   <div class="hero-label">總資產估值</div>
   <div class="hero-value" id="hero-value">NT$0</div>
   <div class="hero-sub">
     <span>帳面損益</span>
     <span id="hero-badge" class="badge-up">+0.00%</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:8px" id="sync-time">即將自動更新...</div>
 </div>

 <div class="ticker-wrap">
   <div class="ticker-inner" id="ticker">
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">台加權</span><span id="t-tw">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">道瓊</span><span id="t-dow">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">那斯達克</span><span id="t-nas">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">S&P500</span><span id="t-sp">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">USD/TWD</span><span id="t-fx">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">台加權</span><span id="t-tw2">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">道瓊</span><span id="t-dow2">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">那斯達克</span><span id="t-nas2">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">S&P500</span><span id="t-sp2">--</span></div>
     <div class="ticker-item"><span class="t-name">USD/TWD</span><span id="t-fx2">--</span></div>
   </div>
 </div>

 <div class="cards">
   <div class="card">
     <div class="card-header">
       <span class="card-title">核心部位</span>
       <span class="card-action" onclick="openEditMain()">編輯</span>
     </div>
     <div class="card-body">
       <div class="stat-grid">
         <div class="stat-box">
           <div class="s-label">0050 帳面獲利</div>
           <div class="s-val green" id="c-profit">--</div>
           <div class="s-sub" id="c-roi">ROI --</div>
         </div>
         <div class="stat-box">
           <div class="s-label">QQQ 庫存(TWD)</div>
           <div class="s-val" id="c-qqq-twd">--</div>
           <div class="s-sub" id="c-qqq-usd">USD --</div>
         </div>
         <div class="stat-box">
           <div class="s-label">本季可導流</div>
           <div class="s-val green" id="c-transfer">--</div>
           <div class="s-sub">USD 導出</div>
         </div>
         <div class="stat-box">
           <div class="s-label">未來資產預估</div>
           <div class="s-val" id="c-future">--</div>
           <div class="s-sub" id="c-future-yrs">--年後</div>
         </div>
       </div>
     </div>
     <div class="margin-bar-wrap">
       <div class="margin-bar-labels">
         <span>安全邊際</span>
         <span id="c-margin-pct" style="color:var(--green)">--%</span>
       </div>
       <div class="margin-bar-track">
         <div class="margin-bar-fill" id="c-margin-bar" style="width:0%"></div>
       </div>
     </div>
   </div>

   <div class="card">
     <div class="card-header"><span class="card-title">資產成長預測</span></div>
     <div class="chart-wrap"><canvas id="growthChart"></canvas></div>
   </div>

   <div class="card">
     <div class="card-header">
       <span class="card-title">自選股</span>
       <span class="card-action" onclick="goPage('watch',document.querySelector('[onclick*=watch]'))">查看全部</span>
     </div>
     <div class="card-body" id="home-watchlist"><div class="empty" style="padding:16px 0"><div class="empty-text">前往追蹤頁新增股票</div></div></div>
   </div>
 </div>

 <div class="form-sheet" id="form-main">
   <div class="form-inner">
     <div class="form-title">
       <span>核心部位設定</span>
       <button class="form-close" onclick="closeForm('form-main')">×</button>
     </div>
     <div class="form-grid">
       <div>
         <label class="form-label">0050 均價</label>
         <input id="cost_price" type="number" class="form-inp" value="48" oninput="safeCalc()">
       </div>
       <div>
         <label class="form-label">0050 市價</label>
         <input id="current_price" type="number" class="form-inp" style="color:var(--green)" value="77" oninput="safeCalc()">
       </div>
       <div>
         <label class="form-label">持有股數</label>
         <input id="shares" type="number" class="form-inp" value="1602" oninput="safeCalc()">
       </div>
       <div>
         <label class="form-label">匯率 USD/TWD</label>
         <input id="fx_rate" type="number" class="form-inp" value="31.4" step="0.1" oninput="safeCalc()">
       </div>
       <div class="form-grid" style="grid-column:1/-1;gap:10px;padding:0">
         <label class="form-label" style="grid-column:1/-1">QQQ 美金庫存</label>
         <input id="qqq_now" type="number" class="form-inp form-inp-lg" style="grid-column:1/-1;font-size:24px;text-align:center" value="25660" oninput="safeCalc()">
       </div>
     </div>
     <div class="slider-group" style="margin-bottom:16px">
       <div class="slider-row"><span class="slider-label">導流火力</span><span class="slider-val" id="sv-ratio">25%</span></div>
       <input type="range" id="transfer_ratio" min="0" max="100" value="25" oninput="safeCalc()">
       <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:4px">
         <div><div class="slider-row"><span class="slider-label" style="font-size:11px">年化</span><span class="slider-val" id="sv-ret" style="font-size:12px">11%</span></div><input type="range" id="expected_return" min="1" max="25" value="11" oninput="safeCalc()"></div>
         <div><div class="slider-row"><span class="slider-label" style="font-size:11px">年限</span><span class="slider-val" id="sv-yrs" style="font-size:12px">5年</span></div><input type="range" id="years" min="1" max="30" value="5" oninput="safeCalc()"></div>
       </div>
     </div>
     <button class="btn-primary" onclick="saveAndClose()">儲存</button>
   </div>
 </div>
</div>

<div id="page-watch" class="page">
 <div class="page-header">
   <div>
     <div class="page-title">自選股</div>
     <div class="page-subtitle">追蹤你的持倉損益</div>
   </div>
   <button class="add-fab" onclick="openAddStock()">
     <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg>
   </button>
 </div>
 <div id="watch-list"></div>

 <div class="section-label">停損 / 停利提醒</div>
 <div style="padding:0 20px">
   <div id="alert-list-home"></div>
   <button onclick="openAddAlert()" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:var(--card);border:1.5px dashed var(--border);border-radius:14px;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:16px">＋ 新增提醒</button>
 </div>

 <div class="section-label">計算歷史</div>
 <div style="padding:0 20px" id="hist-list"></div>
 <div style="padding:0 20px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;gap:8px">
   <button onclick="saveHistory()" style="flex:1;padding:13px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer">📈 儲存當前紀錄</button>
   <button onclick="exportCSV()" style="flex:1;padding:13px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer">📤 匯出 CSV</button>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="form-sheet" id="form-stock">
 <div class="form-inner">
   <div class="form-title"><span>新增股票</span><button class="form-close" onclick="closeForm('form-stock')">×</button></div>
   <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
     <label class="form-label">搜尋股票（點選後帶入）</label>
     <input id="stock-search" class="form-inp form-inp-lg" placeholder="輸入代號或名稱..." oninput="doStockSearch()" onfocus="showAllStocks()" autocomplete="off">
   </div>
   <div id="stock-drop-list" style="background:var(--card2);border-radius:12px;max-height:180px;overflow-y:auto;margin-bottom:12px;display:none"></div>
   <div class="form-grid">
     <div><label class="form-label">成本均價</label><input id="s-cost" type="number" class="form-inp" placeholder="48"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">持有股數</label><input id="s-shares" type="number" class="form-inp" placeholder="1000"></div>
   </div>
   <input type="hidden" id="s-code"><input type="hidden" id="s-name">
   <button class="btn-primary" onclick="addStock()">加入追蹤</button>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="form-sheet" id="form-alert">
 <div class="form-inner">
   <div class="form-title"><span>停損停利設定</span><button class="form-close" onclick="closeForm('form-alert')">×</button></div>
   <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
     <label class="form-label">股票</label>
     <input id="al-search" class="form-inp form-inp-lg" placeholder="輸入代號或名稱..." oninput="doAlertSearch()" onfocus="showAllAlerts()" autocomplete="off">
   </div>
   <div id="al-drop-list" style="background:var(--card2);border-radius:12px;max-height:160px;overflow-y:auto;margin-bottom:12px;display:none"></div>
   <div class="form-grid">
     <div><label class="form-label">目前價格</label><input id="al-cur" type="number" class="form-inp" placeholder="77"></div>
     <div></div>
     <div><label class="form-label" style="color:var(--green)">停利價 🟢</label><input id="al-tp" type="number" class="form-inp" style="color:var(--green)" placeholder="90"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label" style="color:var(--red)">停損價 🔴</label><input id="al-sl" type="number" class="form-inp" style="color:var(--red)" placeholder="65"></div>
   </div>
   <input type="hidden" id="al-code">
   <button class="btn-primary" onclick="addAlert()">設定提醒</button>
 </div>
</div>

<div id="page-news" class="page">
 <div class="page-header">
   <div>
     <div class="page-title">市場新聞</div>
     <div class="page-subtitle" id="news-time">即時財經資訊</div>
   </div>
   <div class="icon-btn" onclick="loadNews()">
     <svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 4v5h.582m15.356 2A8.001 8.001 0 004.582 9m0 0H9m11 11v-5h-.581m0 0a8.003 8.003 0 01-15.357-2m15.357 2H15"/></svg>
   </div>
 </div>
 <div class="news-filter">
   <button class="news-chip active" onclick="filterNews('all',this)">全部</button>
   <button class="news-chip" onclick="filterNews('tw',this)">🇹🇼 台股</button>
   <button class="news-chip" onclick="filterNews('us',this)">🇺🇸 美股</button>
   <button class="news-chip" onclick="filterNews('fx',this)">💱 匯率</button>
 </div>
 <div id="news-list"></div>
</div>

<div id="page-tools" class="page">
 <div class="page-header"><div><div class="page-title">計算工具</div><div class="page-subtitle">投資輔助計算</div></div></div>
 <div class="tool-grid">
   <div class="tool-card" onclick="openTool('dca')"><div class="tool-icon">📅</div><div class="tool-name">定期定額</div><div class="tool-desc">試算複利成長與退休目標</div></div>
   <div class="tool-card" onclick="openTool('dividend')"><div class="tool-icon">💰</div><div class="tool-name">股息試算</div><div class="tool-desc">殖利率與年度配息估算</div></div>
   <div class="tool-card" onclick="openTool('tax')"><div class="tool-icon">🧮</div><div class="tool-name">稅務試算</div><div class="tool-desc">證交稅與股利所得稅比較</div></div>
   <div class="tool-card" onclick="openTool('fx')"><div class="tool-icon">💹</div><div class="tool-name">多幣換算</div><div class="tool-desc">8種貨幣即時換算</div></div>
   <div class="tool-card" onclick="openTool('notes')"><div class="tool-icon">📌</div><div class="tool-name">投資筆記</div><div class="tool-desc">記錄重要備忘與想法</div></div>
   <div class="tool-card" onclick="takeSnapshot()"><div class="tool-icon">📸</div><div class="tool-name">資產快照</div><div class="tool-desc">截圖儲存當前狀態</div></div>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="tool-panel" id="tool-dca">
 <div class="panel-header"><div class="panel-back" onclick="closeTool('tool-dca')"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg></div><div class="panel-title">📅 定期定額</div></div>
 <div class="panel-body">
   <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:16px">
     <div><label class="form-label">每月投入(TWD)</label><input id="dca-m" type="number" value="10000" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDCA()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">年化報酬%</label><input id="dca-r" type="number" value="10" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDCA()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">投資年限</label><input id="dca-y" type="number" value="20" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDCA()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">已有本金</label><input id="dca-i" type="number" value="0" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDCA()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">通膨率%</label><input id="dca-inf" type="number" value="2" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDCA()"></div>
   </div>
   <div class="result-grid">
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">最終資產</div><div class="r-val" id="dca-final">--</div></div>
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">實質資產</div><div class="r-val" id="dca-real">--</div></div>
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">總投入</div><div class="r-val" id="dca-invest">--</div></div>
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">複利獲利</div><div class="r-val" id="dca-gain" style="color:var(--green)">--</div></div>
   </div>
   <div style="height:180px;margin-top:12px"><canvas id="dcaChart"></canvas></div>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="tool-panel" id="tool-dividend">
 <div class="panel-header"><div class="panel-back" onclick="closeTool('tool-dividend')"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg></div><div class="panel-title">💰 股息試算</div></div>
 <div class="panel-body">
   <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:16px">
     <div><label class="form-label">持有股數</label><input id="div-sh" type="number" value="1602" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDiv()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">每股配息</label><input id="div-per" type="number" value="3.5" step="0.1" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDiv()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">股票現價</label><input id="div-price" type="number" value="77" class="form-inp" oninput="calcDiv()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">配息頻率</label>
       <select id="div-freq" onchange="calcDiv()" class="form-inp" style="font-size:14px;text-align:left;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif">
         <option value="1">年配</option><option value="2">半年</option><option value="4">季配</option><option value="12">月配</option>
       </select>
     </div>
   </div>
   <div class="result-card"><div class="result-label">年配息總額</div><div class="result-val" id="div-annual">--</div></div>
   <div class="result-grid">
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">月均配息</div><div class="r-val" id="div-monthly">--</div></div>
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">殖利率</div><div class="r-val" id="div-yield">--</div></div>
   </div>
   <div class="result-card" style="background:rgba(255,77,109,0.06);border-color:rgba(255,77,109,0.15)"><div class="result-label">扣稅後(28%)年配息</div><div class="result-val" style="color:var(--red)" id="div-after">--</div><div class="result-sub">實際稅率依個人所得而異</div></div>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="tool-panel" id="tool-tax">
 <div class="panel-header"><div class="panel-back" onclick="closeTool('tool-tax')"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg></div><div class="panel-title">🧮 稅務試算</div></div>
 <div class="panel-body">
   <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px">證券交易稅</div>
   <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:16px">
     <div><label class="form-label">賣出金額(TWD)</label><input id="tax-sell" type="number" value="100000" class="form-inp" oninput="calcTax()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">類型</label><select id="tax-type" onchange="calcTax()" class="form-inp" style="font-size:13px;text-align:left;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif"><option value="0.003">股票 0.3%</option><option value="0.001">ETF 0.1%</option></select></div>
   </div>
   <div class="result-card" style="margin-bottom:20px"><div class="result-label">應繳證交稅</div><div class="result-val" id="tax-stt">--</div></div>
   <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px">股利所得稅</div>
   <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:12px">
     <div><label class="form-label">全年股利(TWD)</label><input id="tax-div" type="number" value="50000" class="form-inp" oninput="calcTax()"></div>
     <div><label class="form-label">綜所稅率</label><select id="tax-rate" onchange="calcTax()" class="form-inp" style="font-size:12px;text-align:left;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif"><option value="0.05">5%</option><option value="0.12">12%</option><option value="0.20" selected>20%</option><option value="0.30">30%</option><option value="0.40">40%</option></select></div>
   </div>
   <div class="result-grid">
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">合併計稅</div><div class="r-val" id="tax-merge">--</div></div>
     <div class="result-mini"><div class="r-label">分離課稅28%</div><div class="r-val" id="tax-sep">--</div></div>
   </div>
   <div style="margin-top:12px;padding:12px 16px;background:var(--card2);border-radius:12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)">💡 建議選擇 <span id="tax-suggest" style="color:var(--amber);font-weight:700">計算中</span></div>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="tool-panel" id="tool-fx">
 <div class="panel-header"><div class="panel-back" onclick="closeTool('tool-fx')"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg></div><div class="panel-title">💹 多幣換算</div></div>
 <div class="panel-body">
   <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:20px">
     <div class="form-grid" style="grid-column:1/-1;gap:10px;padding:0">
       <div style="grid-column:1/-1;display:flex;gap:10px">
         <input id="fx-amt" type="number" value="1000" class="form-inp" style="flex:1" oninput="calcFx()">
         <select id="fx-base" onchange="calcFx()" class="form-inp" style="width:110px;font-size:14px;text-align:center;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">
           <option value="USD" selected>🇺🇸 USD</option><option value="TWD">🇹🇼 TWD</option>
           <option value="JPY">🇯🇵 JPY</option><option value="EUR">🇪🇺 EUR</option>
           <option value="GBP">🇬🇧 GBP</option><option value="HKD">🇭🇰 HKD</option>
         </select>
       </div>
     </div>
   </div>
   <div id="fx-list"></div>
   <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:12px" id="fx-updated"></div>
   <button onclick="loadFx()" style="width:100%;margin-top:12px;padding:13px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;color:var(--green);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">🔄 更新即時匯率</button>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="tool-panel" id="tool-notes">
 <div class="panel-header"><div class="panel-back" onclick="closeTool('tool-notes')"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg></div><div class="panel-title">📌 投資筆記</div></div>
 <div class="panel-body">
   <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px">
     <input id="note-inp" class="form-inp form-inp-lg" style="flex:1" placeholder="記錄想法..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')addNote()">
     <button onclick="addNote()" style="padding:12px 18px;background:var(--green);color:#07090f;font-weight:800;border:none;border-radius:14px;cursor:pointer;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0">＋</button>
   </div>
   <div id="notes-list"></div>
 </div>
</div>

<div id="page-settings" class="page">
 <div class="page-header"><div><div class="page-title">我的設定</div><div class="page-subtitle">個人化調整</div></div></div>
 <div class="setting-row">
   <div class="setting-left"><div class="s-title">深色 / 淺色模式</div><div class="s-desc">調整整體配色風格</div></div>
   <button class="toggle" id="toggle-theme" onclick="toggleTheme()"></button>
 </div>
 <div class="setting-row">
   <div class="setting-left"><div class="s-title">字體大小</div><div class="s-desc">選擇舒適的閱讀大小</div></div>
   <div class="size-btns">
     <button class="size-btn" onclick="setFs('14px',this)">小</button>
     <button class="size-btn active" onclick="setFs('16px',this)">中</button>
     <button class="size-btn" onclick="setFs('18px',this)">大</button>
   </div>
 </div>
 <div class="setting-row" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px">
   <div class="setting-left"><div class="s-title">主題顏色</div></div>
   <div class="theme-dots">
     <div class="t-dot active" style="background:#00d97e" onclick="setAccent('#00d97e','#6366f1',this)"></div>
     <div class="t-dot" style="background:#3b82f6" onclick="setAccent('#3b82f6','#8b5cf6',this)"></div>
     <div class="t-dot" style="background:#f43f5e" onclick="setAccent('#f43f5e','#f97316',this)"></div>
     <div class="t-dot" style="background:#f59e0b" onclick="setAccent('#f59e0b','#10b981',this)"></div>
     <div class="t-dot" style="background:#a855f7" onclick="setAccent('#a855f7','#ec4899',this)"></div>
   </div>
 </div>
 <div class="setting-row" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="exportCSV()">
   <div class="setting-left"><div class="s-title">匯出 CSV 報表</div><div class="s-desc">下載所有計算歷史紀錄</div></div>
   <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" style="color:var(--muted)"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
 </div>
 <div class="setting-row" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="takeSnapshot()">
   <div class="setting-left"><div class="s-title">資產快照</div><div class="s-desc">截圖儲存當前畫面</div></div>
   <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" style="color:var(--muted)"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
 </div>
 <div class="setting-row" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="if(confirm('確定清除所有資料？')){localStorage.clear();location.reload()}">
   <div class="setting-left"><div class="s-title" style="color:var(--red)">清除所有資料</div><div class="s-desc">重置所有設定與紀錄</div></div>
   <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" style="color:var(--red)"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
 </div>
 <div style="padding:24px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">WinnerFlow v3.1 · 資料僅存在本機</div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script>
<script>
// ===== 資料 =====
var D={
 cost:48,cur:77,shares:1602,fx:31.4,qqq:25660,
 ratio:25,ret:11,yrs:5
};
var watchlist=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wf_watch'))||[];
var alertList=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wf_alerts'))||[];
var histList=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wf_history'))||[];
var noteList=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wf_notes'))||[];
var allNews=[],fxRates={};
var myChart=null,dcaC=null;

// ===== 設定 =====
var isLight=localStorage.getItem('wf_lite')==='1';
var currentFs=localStorage.getItem('wf_fs')||'16px';

function applySettings(){
 document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--fs',currentFs);
 if(isLight){
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg','#f4f7ff');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--surface','#edf1ff');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card','#fff');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card2','#f0f3ff');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--border','rgba(0,0,0,0.08)');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--border2','rgba(0,0,0,0.04)');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text','#0a0f1e');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--muted','#5a6a8a');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--muted2','#aab5cc');
 }else{
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg','#07090f');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--surface','#0d1117');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card','#131b27');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card2','#1a2332');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--border','rgba(255,255,255,0.07)');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--border2','rgba(255,255,255,0.04)');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--text','#f0f4ff');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--muted','#5a6a8a');
   document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--muted2','#3a4a65');
 }
 document.getElementById('toggle-theme').classList.toggle('on',isLight);
}
function toggleTheme(){isLight=!isLight;localStorage.setItem('wf_lite',isLight?'1':'0');applySettings();}
function setFs(v,el){currentFs=v;localStorage.setItem('wf_fs',v);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--fs',v);document.querySelectorAll('.size-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');}
function setAccent(a,a2,el){
 document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--green',a);
 document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--green-dim','rgba('+hexToRgb(a)+',0.12)');
 document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--green-glow','rgba('+hexToRgb(a)+',0.25)');
 document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent2',a2);
 localStorage.setItem('wf_accent',a);localStorage.setItem('wf_accent2',a2);
 document.querySelectorAll('.t-dot').forEach(d=>d.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');
}
function hexToRgb(hex){var r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);return r+','+g+','+b;}
applySettings();
// 恢復主題顏色
var sa=localStorage.getItem('wf_accent'),sa2=localStorage.getItem('wf_accent2');
if(sa){document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--green',sa);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--green-dim','rgba('+hexToRgb(sa)+',0.12)');document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--green-glow','rgba('+hexToRgb(sa)+',0.25)');if(sa2)document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent2',sa2);}
// 恢復字體標示
document.querySelectorAll('.size-btn').forEach(b=>{if(b.textContent==={14:'小',16:'中',18:'大'}[parseInt(currentFs)])b.classList.add('active');});

// ===== Toast =====
function toast(msg,clr){
 var t=document.getElementById('toast');
 t.textContent=msg;if(clr)t.style.background=clr;
 t.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>{t.classList.remove('show');t.style.background='';},2500);
}

// ===== 導航 =====
function goPage(name,btn){
 document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
 document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
 document.getElementById('page-'+name).classList.add('active');
 if(btn)btn.classList.add('active');
 if(name==='news')loadNews();
 if(name==='watch'){renderWatch();renderAlerts();renderHist();}
 if(name==='settings')applySettings();
}

// ===== 計算 =====
function safeCalc(){
 D.cost=parseFloat(document.getElementById('cost_price').value)||48;
 D.cur=parseFloat(document.getElementById('current_price').value)||77;
 D.shares=parseFloat(document.getElementById('shares').value)||1602;
 D.fx=parseFloat(document.getElementById('fx_rate').value)||31.4;
 D.qqq=parseFloat(document.getElementById('qqq_now').value)||25660;
 D.ratio=parseFloat(document.getElementById('transfer_ratio').value)||25;
 D.ret=parseFloat(document.getElementById('expected_return').value)||11;
 D.yrs=parseInt(document.getElementById('years').value)||5;
 document.getElementById('sv-ratio').textContent=D.ratio+'%';
 document.getElementById('sv-ret').textContent=D.ret+'%';
 document.getElementById('sv-yrs').textContent=D.yrs+'年';
 localStorage.setItem('wf_d',JSON.stringify(D));
 updateUI();
}
function updateUI(){
 var profit=(D.cur-D.cost)*D.shares;
 var totalTwd=D.cur*D.shares+D.qqq*D.fx;
 var margin=(D.cur-D.cost)/D.cur;
 var roi=((D.cur-D.cost)/D.cost*100);
 var extractTwd=profit*(D.ratio/100);
 var friction=extractTwd>0?(extractTwd*0.004425+850):0;
 var netUsd=(extractTwd-friction>0)?(extractTwd-friction)/D.fx:0;
 var principal=D.qqq+(margin>=0.1?netUsd:0);
 var future=principal*Math.pow(1+(D.ret/100),D.yrs);
 // 英雄區
 document.getElementById('hero-value').textContent='NT$'+fmt(totalTwd);
 var badge=document.getElementById('hero-badge');
 badge.textContent=(roi>=0?'+':'')+roi.toFixed(2)+'%';
 badge.className=roi>=0?'badge-up':'badge-down';
 // 卡片
 document.getElementById('c-profit').textContent=(profit>=0?'+':'-')+'NT$'+fmt(Math.abs(profit));
 document.getElementById('c-profit').style.color=profit>=0?'var(--green)':'var(--red)';
 document.getElementById('c-roi').textContent='ROI '+(roi>=0?'+':'')+roi.toFixed(1)+'%';
 document.getElementById('c-qqq-twd').textContent='NT$'+fmt(D.qqq*D.fx);
 document.getElementById('c-qqq-usd').textContent='USD '+fmt(D.qqq);
 document.getElementById('c-transfer').textContent='$'+fmt(netUsd);
 document.getElementById('c-future').textContent='$'+fmt(future);
 document.getElementById('c-future-yrs').textContent=D.yrs+'年後預估';
 document.getElementById('c-margin-pct').textContent=(margin*100).toFixed(1)+'%';
 var bar=document.getElementById('c-margin-bar');
 bar.style.width=Math.min(100,Math.max(0,margin*200))+'%';
 bar.style.background=margin>=0.2?'var(--green)':margin>=0.1?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)';
 // 圖
 drawChart(principal,D.ret,D.yrs);
}
function drawChart(principal,ret,yrs){
 if(typeof Chart==='undefined')return;
 var lbls=[],dta=[];
 for(var i=0;i<=yrs;i++){lbls.push('Y'+i);dta.push(Math.round(principal*Math.pow(1+(ret/100),i)));}
 if(myChart)myChart.destroy();
 var ctx=document.getElementById('growthChart').getContext('2d');
 var g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,120);
 var accentColor=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--green').trim()||'#00d97e';
 g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,217,126,0.2)');g.addColorStop(1,'transparent');
 myChart=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:lbls,datasets:[{data:dta,borderColor:accentColor,backgroundColor:g,fill:true,tension:0.4,borderWidth:2,pointRadius:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{duration:600},plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:ctx=>'$'+fmt(ctx.raw)}}},scales:{y:{display:false},x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#5a6a8a',font:{size:10,family:'DM Mono'}}}}}});
}

function saveAndClose(){safeCalc();closeForm('form-main');toast('✅ 已儲存');}
function openEditMain(){document.getElementById('form-main').classList.add('open');}
function closeForm(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');}

// ===== fmt =====
function fmt(n){var num=parseFloat(n);if(isNaN(num))return'0';return num.toLocaleString('en-US',{maximumFractionDigits:0});}

// ===== 股票資料庫 =====
var STOCKS=[
 {code:'0050',name:'元大台灣50',type:'ETF'},{code:'0056',name:'元大高股息',type:'ETF'},
 {code:'006208',name:'富邦台50',type:'ETF'},{code:'00878',name:'國泰永續高股息',type:'ETF'},
 {code:'00919',name:'群益台灣精選高息',type:'ETF'},{code:'00929',name:'復華台灣科技優息',type:'ETF'},
 {code:'00940',name:'元大台灣價值高息',type:'ETF'},{code:'00713',name:'元大台灣高息低波',type:'ETF'},
 {code:'00900',name:'富邦特選高股息30',type:'ETF'},{code:'00881',name:'國泰台灣5G+',type:'ETF'},
 {code:'00891',name:'中信關鍵半導體',type:'ETF'},{code:'2330',name:'台積電',type:'半導體'},
 {code:'2317',name:'鴻海',type:'電子'},{code:'2454',name:'聯發科',type:'半導體'},
 {code:'2308',name:'台達電',type:'電子'},{code:'2382',name:'廣達',type:'電腦'},
 {code:'2357',name:'華碩',type:'電腦'},{code:'2379',name:'瑞昱',type:'半導體'},
 {code:'2412',name:'中華電信',type:'電信'},{code:'2881',name:'富邦金',type:'金融'},
 {code:'2882',name:'國泰金',type:'金融'},{code:'2884',name:'玉山金',type:'金融'},
 {code:'2886',name:'兆豐金',type:'金融'},{code:'2891',name:'中信金',type:'金融'},
 {code:'2892',name:'第一金',type:'金融'},{code:'2002',name:'中鋼',type:'鋼鐵'},
 {code:'3008',name:'大立光',type:'光學'},{code:'3711',name:'日月光投控',type:'半導體'},
 {code:'AAPL',name:'Apple 蘋果',type:'美股'},{code:'MSFT',name:'Microsoft',type:'美股'},
 {code:'NVDA',name:'Nvidia 輝達',type:'美股'},{code:'GOOGL',name:'Alphabet',type:'美股'},
 {code:'AMZN',name:'Amazon',type:'美股'},{code:'META',name:'Meta',type:'美股'},
 {code:'TSLA',name:'Tesla',type:'美股'},{code:'TSM',name:'台積電ADR',type:'美股'},
 {code:'QQQ',name:'Nasdaq 100 ETF',type:'美ETF'},{code:'SPY',name:'S&P 500 ETF',type:'美ETF'},
 {code:'VOO',name:'Vanguard S&P500',type:'美ETF'},{code:'SOXX',name:'半導體ETF',type:'美ETF'},
];
function renderStockDrop(listId,q){
 var el=document.getElementById(listId);
 var res=q?STOCKS.filter(s=>s.code.toUpperCase().includes(q.toUpperCase())||s.name.includes(q)):STOCKS;
 el.style.display=res.length?'block':'none';
 el.innerHTML=res.slice(0,12).map(s=>`<div class="drop-item" onclick="pickStock('${s.code}','${s.name}','${listId}')"><span class="drop-item-code">${s.code}</span><span class="drop-item-name">${s.name}</span><span class="drop-item-type">${s.type}</span></div>`).join('');
}
function pickStock(code,name,listId){
 if(listId==='stock-drop-list'){
   document.getElementById('stock-search').value=code+' '+name;
   document.getElementById('s-code').value=code;document.getElementById('s-name').value=name;
 }else{
   document.getElementById('al-search').value=code+' '+name;
   document.getElementById('al-code').value=code;
 }
 document.getElementById(listId).style.display='none';
}
function showAllStocks(){renderStockDrop('stock-drop-list','');}
function doStockSearch(){renderStockDrop('stock-drop-list',document.getElementById('stock-search').value);}
function showAllAlerts(){renderStockDrop('al-drop-list','');}
function doAlertSearch(){renderStockDrop('al-drop-list',document.getElementById('al-search').value);}

// ===== 自選股 =====
function openAddStock(){document.getElementById('stock-search').value='';document.getElementById('s-code').value='';document.getElementById('s-name').value='';document.getElementById('s-cost').value='';document.getElementById('s-shares').value='';document.getElementById('stock-drop-list').style.display='none';document.getElementById('form-stock').classList.add('open');}
function addStock(){
 var code=document.getElementById('s-code').value||document.getElementById('stock-search').value.split(' ')[0];
 var name=document.getElementById('s-name').value||document.getElementById('stock-search').value.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ')||code;
 var cost=parseFloat(document.getElementById('s-cost').value)||0;
 var sh=parseFloat(document.getElementById('s-shares').value)||0;
 if(!code){toast('請選擇股票','var(--red)');return;}
 watchlist.push({code,name,cost,shares:sh,cur:cost});
 localStorage.setItem('wf_watch',JSON.stringify(watchlist));
 closeForm('form-stock');renderWatch();updateHomeWatch();toast('✅ 已加入 '+code);
}
function delStock(i){watchlist.splice(i,1);localStorage.setItem('wf_watch',JSON.stringify(watchlist));renderWatch();updateHomeWatch();}
function renderWatch(){
 var el=document.getElementById('watch-list');
 if(!watchlist.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📊</div><div class="empty-text">點右上角 ＋ 新增追蹤股票</div></div>';return;}
 el.innerHTML=watchlist.map((w,i)=>{
   var profit=(w.cur-w.cost)*w.shares,roi=w.cost>0?((w.cur-w.cost)/w.cost*100):0,pos=roi>=0;
   return`<div class="stock-item" onclick="">
     <div class="stock-avatar">${w.code.slice(0,4)}</div>
     <div class="stock-info"><div class="stock-code">${w.code}</div><div class="stock-name">${w.name}</div></div>
     <div class="stock-right">
       <div class="stock-roi ${pos?'roi-pos':'roi-neg'}">${pos?'+':''}${roi.toFixed(1)}%</div>
       <div class="stock-profit">${pos?'+':'-'}NT$${fmt(Math.abs(profit))}</div>
     </div>
     <button onclick="event.stopPropagation();delStock(${i})" style="color:var(--muted2);background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;padding:4px;flex-shrink:0">×</button>
   </div>`;
 }).join('');
}
function updateHomeWatch(){
 var el=document.getElementById('home-watchlist');
 if(!watchlist.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty" style="padding:12px 0"><div class="empty-text" style="font-size:12px">前往追蹤頁新增股票</div></div>';return;}
 el.innerHTML=watchlist.slice(0,3).map(w=>{
   var roi=w.cost>0?((w.cur-w.cost)/w.cost*100):0,pos=roi>=0;
   return`<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2)">
     <div><div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:var(--text)">${w.code}</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">${w.name}</div></div>
     <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:14px;color:${pos?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'};font-weight:500">${pos?'+':''}${roi.toFixed(1)}%</div>
   </div>`;
 }).join('');
}

// ===== 停損停利 =====
function openAddAlert(){document.getElementById('al-search').value='';document.getElementById('al-code').value='';document.getElementById('al-cur').value='';document.getElementById('al-tp').value='';document.getElementById('al-sl').value='';document.getElementById('al-drop-list').style.display='none';document.getElementById('form-alert').classList.add('open');}
function addAlert(){
 var code=document.getElementById('al-code').value||document.getElementById('al-search').value.split(' ')[0];
 var cur=parseFloat(document.getElementById('al-cur').value)||0;
 var tp=parseFloat(document.getElementById('al-tp').value)||0;
 var sl=parseFloat(document.getElementById('al-sl').value)||0;
 if(!code){toast('請選擇股票','var(--red)');return;}
 alertList.push({code,cur,tp,sl,triggered:false});
 localStorage.setItem('wf_alerts',JSON.stringify(alertList));
 closeForm('form-alert');renderAlerts();toast('✅ 已設定 '+code);
}
function delAlert(i){alertList.splice(i,1);localStorage.setItem('wf_alerts',JSON.stringify(alertList));renderAlerts();}
function renderAlerts(){
 var el=document.getElementById('alert-list-home');
 if(!alertList.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding:4px 0 12px">尚無提醒設定</div>';return;}
 el.innerHTML=alertList.map((a,i)=>{
   var hasTP=a.tp>0,hasSL=a.sl>0;
   return`<div class="alert-item">
     <div class="alert-color" style="background:${a.triggered?'var(--amber)':hasTP?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}"></div>
     <div class="alert-info"><div class="alert-code">${a.code}</div><div class="alert-levels">🟢 ${hasTP?a.tp:'未設'}   🔴 ${hasSL?a.sl:'未設'}${a.triggered?'   ⚡ 已觸發':''}</div></div>
     <button onclick="delAlert(${i})" style="color:var(--muted2);background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer">×</button>
   </div>`;
 }).join('');
}

// ===== 歷史 =====
function saveHistory(){
 histList.unshift({time:new Date().toLocaleString('zh-TW'),cost:D.cost,cur:D.cur,shares:D.shares,profit:(D.cur-D.cost)*D.shares,roi:((D.cur-D.cost)/D.cost*100).toFixed(1),qqq:D.qqq,fx:D.fx});
 if(histList.length>50)histList.pop();
 localStorage.setItem('wf_history',JSON.stringify(histList));
 renderHist();toast('✅ 已儲存紀錄');
}
function delHist(i){histList.splice(i,1);localStorage.setItem('wf_history',JSON.stringify(histList));renderHist();}
function renderHist(){
 var el=document.getElementById('hist-list');
 if(!histList.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);padding:4px 0 12px">尚無紀錄</div>';return;}
 el.innerHTML=histList.slice(0,10).map((h,i)=>{
   var pos=parseFloat(h.roi)>=0;
   return`<div class="hist-item">
     <div class="hist-line" style="background:${pos?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}"></div>
     <div class="hist-content">
       <div class="hist-time">${h.time}</div>
       <div class="hist-main">0050 ${h.cost}→${h.cur}  股數 ${h.shares}</div>
       <div class="hist-roi" style="color:${pos?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">${pos?'+':''}${fmt(h.profit)} TWD  (${h.roi}%)</div>
     </div>
     <button onclick="delHist(${i})" style="color:var(--muted2);background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;align-self:flex-start">×</button>
   </div>`;
 }).join('');
}
function exportCSV(){
 if(!histList.length){toast('尚無紀錄','var(--amber)');return;}
 var rows=[['時間','均價','市價','股數','獲利TWD','ROI%','QQQ','匯率']];
 histList.forEach(h=>rows.push([h.time,h.cost,h.cur,h.shares,h.profit,h.roi,h.qqq,h.fx]));
 var blob=new Blob(['\uFEFF'+rows.map(r=>r.join(',')).join('\n')],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});
 var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download='WinnerFlow_'+new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-TW').replace(/\//g,'-')+'.csv';a.click();toast('✅ CSV 已下載');
}

// ===== 工具 =====
function openTool(name){var p=document.getElementById('tool-'+name);p.classList.add('open');if(name==='dca')calcDCA();if(name==='dividend')calcDiv();if(name==='tax')calcTax();if(name==='fx')calcFx();if(name==='notes')renderNotes();}
function closeTool(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');}
function calcDCA(){
 var m=parseFloat(document.getElementById('dca-m').value)||10000,r=(parseFloat(document.getElementById('dca-r').value)||10)/100;
 var y=parseInt(document.getElementById('dca-y').value)||20,init=parseFloat(document.getElementById('dca-i').value)||0;
 var inf=(parseFloat(document.getElementById('dca-inf').value)||2)/100;
 var mr=r/12,n=y*12,fv=init*Math.pow(1+r,y)+m*(Math.pow(1+mr,n)-1)/mr;
 var real=fv/Math.pow(1+inf,y),totalIn=init+m*n;
 document.getElementById('dca-final').textContent='NT$'+fmt(fv);
 document.getElementById('dca-real').textContent='NT$'+fmt(real);
 document.getElementById('dca-invest').textContent='NT$'+fmt(totalIn);
 document.getElementById('dca-gain').textContent='NT$'+fmt(fv-totalIn);
 if(typeof Chart!=='undefined'){
   var lbls=[],nom=[],rl=[];
   for(var i=0;i<=y;i++){lbls.push('Y'+i);var ni=init*Math.pow(1+r,i)+m*12*(Math.pow(1+r,i)-1)/r;nom.push(ni);rl.push(ni/Math.pow(1+inf,i));}
   if(dcaC)dcaC.destroy();
   var ctx=document.getElementById('dcaChart').getContext('2d');
   var g1=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,180);g1.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,217,126,0.2)');g1.addColorStop(1,'transparent');
   var g2=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,180);g2.addColorStop(0,'rgba(99,102,241,0.15)');g2.addColorStop(1,'transparent');
   dcaC=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:lbls,datasets:[{label:'名目',data:nom,borderColor:'#00d97e',backgroundColor:g1,fill:true,tension:0.4,borderWidth:2,pointRadius:0},{label:'實質',data:rl,borderColor:'#6366f1',backgroundColor:g2,fill:true,tension:0.4,borderWidth:1.5,pointRadius:0,borderDash:[4,3]}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{labels:{color:'#5a6a8a',font:{size:10}}}},scales:{y:{display:false},x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#5a6a8a',font:{size:10,family:'DM Mono'}}}}}});
 }
}
function calcDiv(){
 var sh=parseFloat(document.getElementById('div-sh').value)||1602,per=parseFloat(document.getElementById('div-per').value)||3.5;
 var freq=parseInt(document.getElementById('div-freq').value)||1,price=parseFloat(document.getElementById('div-price').value)||77;
 var annual=sh*per*freq;
 document.getElementById('div-annual').textContent='NT$'+fmt(annual);
 document.getElementById('div-monthly').textContent='NT$'+fmt(annual/12);
 document.getElementById('div-yield').textContent=(per*freq/price*100).toFixed(2)+'%';
 document.getElementById('div-after').textContent='NT$'+fmt(annual*0.72);
}
function calcTax(){
 var sell=parseFloat(document.getElementById('tax-sell').value)||0,rate=parseFloat(document.getElementById('tax-type').value)||0.003;
 document.getElementById('tax-stt').textContent='NT$'+fmt(sell*rate);
 var div=parseFloat(document.getElementById('tax-div').value)||0,ir=parseFloat(document.getElementById('tax-rate').value)||0.2;
 var credit=div*0.085,merge=(div+credit)*ir-credit,sep=div*0.28;
 document.getElementById('tax-merge').textContent='NT$'+fmt(Math.max(0,merge));
 document.getElementById('tax-sep').textContent='NT$'+fmt(sep);
 document.getElementById('tax-suggest').textContent=merge<sep?'合併計稅':'分離課稅28%';
}
var fxData={USD:1,TWD:31.4,JPY:150.2,EUR:0.92,GBP:0.79,HKD:7.82};
function calcFx(){
 var amt=parseFloat(document.getElementById('fx-amt').value)||1,base=document.getElementById('fx-base').value;
 var baseRate=fxData[base]||1;
 var CURR=[{code:'TWD',flag:'🇹🇼',name:'新台幣'},{code:'USD',flag:'🇺🇸',name:'美元'},{code:'JPY',flag:'🇯🇵',name:'日圓'},{code:'EUR',flag:'🇪🇺',name:'歐元'},{code:'GBP',flag:'🇬🇧',name:'英鎊'},{code:'HKD',flag:'🇭🇰',name:'港幣'},{code:'KRW',flag:'🇰🇷',name:'韓元'}];
 if(!fxData.KRW)fxData.KRW=1340;
 document.getElementById('fx-list').innerHTML=CURR.filter(c=>c.code!==base).map(c=>{
   var r=fxData[c.code]||0,res=amt/baseRate*r;
   var disp=(c.code==='KRW'||c.code==='JPY')?Math.round(res).toLocaleString():res.toFixed(2);
   return`<div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-flag">${c.flag}</span><div class="fx-info"><div class="fx-code">${c.code}</div><div class="fx-name">${c.name}</div></div><div class="fx-amount">${disp}</div></div>`;
 }).join('');
}
async function loadFx(){
 try{var r=await Promise.race([fetch('https://api.exchangerate-api.com/v4/latest/USD'),new Promise((_,rj)=>setTimeout(()=>rj(),5000))]);var d=await r.json();fxData=d.rates;calcFx();document.getElementById('fx-updated').textContent='更新：'+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('zh-TW');toast('✅ 匯率已更新');}
 catch{calcFx();toast('使用近似匯率','var(--amber)');}
}

// ===== 筆記 =====
function addNote(){var v=document.getElementById('note-inp').value.trim();if(!v)return;noteList.unshift({text:v,time:new Date().toLocaleString('zh-TW'),pin:false});localStorage.setItem('wf_notes',JSON.stringify(noteList));document.getElementById('note-inp').value='';renderNotes();toast('✅ 已儲存');}
function delNote(i){noteList.splice(i,1);localStorage.setItem('wf_notes',JSON.stringify(noteList));renderNotes();}
function pinNote(i){noteList[i].pin=!noteList[i].pin;noteList.sort((a,b)=>(b.pin?1:0)-(a.pin?1:0));localStorage.setItem('wf_notes',JSON.stringify(noteList));renderNotes();}
function renderNotes(){
 var el=document.getElementById('notes-list');
 if(!noteList.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📌</div><div class="empty-text">輸入後按 Enter 新增筆記</div></div>';return;}
 el.innerHTML=noteList.map((n,i)=>`<div class="note-item">
   <div class="note-pin ${n.pin?'':'off'}" onclick="pinNote(${i})">📌</div>
   <div style="flex:1"><div class="note-text">${n.text}</div><div class="note-time">${n.time}</div></div>
   <button class="note-del" onclick="delNote(${i})">×</button>
 </div>`).join('');
}

// ===== 新聞 (優化版) =====
var FALLBACK=[
 {title:'【台股】加權指數震盪整理，半導體族群維持強勢',link:'https://tw.stock.yahoo.com',date:new Date().toISOString(),cat:'tw',dot:'dot-tw',src:'台股'},
 {title:'【台股】0050 ETF法人持續買超，創規模新高',link:'https://tw.stock.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-3600000).toISOString(),cat:'tw',dot:'dot-tw',src:'台股'},
 {title:'【台股】台積電外資連買，目標價上調至1100元',link:'https://tw.stock.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-7200000).toISOString(),cat:'tw',dot:'dot-tw',src:'台股'},
 {title:'【美股】那斯達克指數創高，AI概念股全面上漲',link:'https://finance.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-1800000).toISOString(),cat:'us',dot:'dot-us',src:'美股'},
 {title:'【美股】QQQ資金淨流入達50億美元，科技股強勢',link:'https://finance.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-5400000).toISOString(),cat:'us',dot:'dot-us',src:'美股'},
 {title:'【美股】Fed維持利率不變，市場降息預期升溫',link:'https://finance.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-9000000).toISOString(),cat:'us',dot:'dot-us',src:'美股'},
 {title:'【匯率】新台幣小幅升值，外資匯入推升',link:'https://tw.stock.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-2700000).toISOString(),cat:'fx',dot:'dot-fx',src:'匯率'},
 {title:'【匯率】日圓持續弱勢，美元指數高檔整理',link:'https://tw.stock.yahoo.com',date:new Date(Date.now()-6300000).toISOString(),cat:'fx',dot:'dot-fx',src:'匯率'},
];
async function loadNews(){
 var el=document.getElementById('news-list');
 el.innerHTML='<div class="empty" style="padding:32px 0"><div class="empty-icon pulse">📡</div><div class="empty-text">載入新聞中...</div></div>';
 allNews=[];
 var parser=new DOMParser();
 // 改用 raw 模式直接獲取 XML，避免 JSON 轉譯出錯
 var SOURCES=[
   {url:'https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url='+encodeURIComponent('https://tw.stock.yahoo.com/rss'),cat:'tw',dot:'dot-tw',src:'Yahoo台股'},
   {url:'https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url='+encodeURIComponent('https://finance.yahoo.com/news/rssindex'),cat:'us',dot:'dot-us',src:'Yahoo美股'}
 ];
 for(var s of SOURCES){
   try{
     var res=await Promise.race([fetch(s.url),new Promise((_,r)=>setTimeout(()=>r(),6000))]);
     var text=await res.text();
     var xml=parser.parseFromString(text,'text/xml');
     xml.querySelectorAll('item').forEach(item=>{
       var title=item.querySelector('title')?.textContent?.trim()||'';
       var link=item.querySelector('link')?.textContent?.trim()||'#';
       var date=item.querySelector('pubDate')?.textContent||new Date().toISOString();
       if(title&&title.length>5)allNews.push({title,link,date:new Date(date).toISOString(),cat:s.cat,dot:s.dot,src:s.src});
     });
   }catch(e){ console.log('News fetch error:', e); }
 }
 if(!allNews.length)allNews=[...FALLBACK];
 allNews.sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.date)-new Date(a.date));
 var n=new Date();
 document.getElementById('news-time').textContent='更新 '+n.getHours()+':'+n.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2,'0')+(allNews.length>FALLBACK.length?' ✓':' (備用數據)');
 filterNews('all',document.querySelector('.news-chip.active'));
}
var currentNewsFilter='all';
function filterNews(cat,el){
 currentNewsFilter=cat;
 if(el){document.querySelectorAll('.news-chip').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');}
 var items=cat==='all'?allNews:allNews.filter(n=>n.cat===cat);
 var cont=document.getElementById('news-list');
 if(!items.length){cont.innerHTML='<div class="empty"><div class="empty-text">暫無此類新聞</div></div>';return;}
 cont.innerHTML=items.map(n=>`<div class="news-item" onclick="window.open('${n.link}','_blank')">
   <div class="news-dot ${n.dot}" style="margin-top:5px"></div>
   <div class="news-content">
     <div class="news-title">${n.title}</div>
     <div class="news-meta">${n.src} · ${new Date(n.date).toLocaleString('zh-TW',{month:'numeric',day:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</div>
   </div>
 </div>`).join('');
}

// ===== 同步市場 (全自選股自動同步版) =====
async function syncMarket(){
 var icon=document.getElementById('sync-icon');
 icon.style.animation='spin 1s linear infinite';
 icon.style.transformOrigin='center';
 if(!document.getElementById('spin-style')){
   var style=document.createElement('style');style.id='spin-style';style.textContent='@keyframes spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}';document.head.appendChild(style);
 }
 
 var fx=null, stk=null;
 var isSuccess = false;
 
 // 1. 匯率同步 (Exchangerate-API)
 try{
   var r=await Promise.race([fetch('https://api.exchangerate-api.com/v4/latest/USD'),new Promise((_,rj)=>setTimeout(()=>rj(),5000))]);
   var d=await r.json();
   if(d&&d.rates){ fx=d.rates.TWD; isSuccess = true; }
 }catch(e){ console.log('FX error:', e); }
 
 // 2. 股市數據 (大盤 + 0050 + 所有自選股)
 try{
   // 輔助函式：判斷純數字代號自動補上 .TW (台股)，其餘當作美股
   const getYahooSymbol = (code) => /^[0-9]{4,6}$/.test(code) ? code + '.TW' : code;
   
   // 整理所有需要抓取的代號 (去重複)
   var baseSymbols = ['0050.TW', '^TWII', '^DJI', '^IXIC', '^GSPC'];
   var watchSymbols = watchlist.map(w => getYahooSymbol(w.code));
   var allSymbols = [...new Set([...baseSymbols, ...watchSymbols])];
   
   // 將代號串列組成 API 網址
   var url='https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v7/finance/spark?symbols=' + allSymbols.join(',');
   var ri=await Promise.race([fetch('https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url='+encodeURIComponent(url)),new Promise((_,rj)=>setTimeout(()=>rj(),6000))]);
   var di=await ri.json();
   var results=di?.spark?.result||[];
   
   var MAP={'^TWII':['t-tw','t-tw2'],'^DJI':['t-dow','t-dow2'],'^IXIC':['t-nas','t-nas2'],'^GSPC':['t-sp','t-sp2']};
   
   results.forEach(res=>{
     var sym=res.symbol;
     var meta=res.response[0]?.meta;
     if(!meta) return;
     
     var p = meta.regularMarketPrice;
     var prev = meta.previousClose || meta.chartPreviousClose || p;
     var c = ((p - prev) / prev) * 100;
     var pos = c >= 0;
     
     // 更新核心部位 0050
     if(sym === '0050.TW') { stk = p; isSuccess = true; }
     
     // 更新大盤跑馬燈
     var ids = MAP[sym];
     if(ids){
       var txt=(p>=1000 ? Math.round(p).toLocaleString() : p.toFixed(2))+' '+(pos?'▲':'▼')+Math.abs(c).toFixed(2)+'%';
       ids.forEach(id=>{var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.textContent=txt;el.className=pos?'t-up':'t-dn';}});
     }
     
     // 更新自選股清單價格
     watchlist.forEach(w => {
       if(getYahooSymbol(w.code) === sym) { w.cur = p; isSuccess = true; }
     });
     
     // 檢查停損停利提醒 (包含 0050 與所有自選股)
     alertList.forEach(a => {
       if(getYahooSymbol(a.code) === sym && !a.triggered) {
         if(a.tp && p >= a.tp){ toast('🎯 ' + a.code + ' 停利 '+a.tp+' 觸發！','var(--green)'); a.triggered = true; }
         if(a.sl && p <= a.sl){ toast('⚠️ ' + a.code + ' 停損 '+a.sl+' 觸發！','var(--red)'); a.triggered = true; }
       }
     });
   });
 }catch(e){ console.log('Stock fetch error:', e); }

 // 將新數據寫入畫面與 LocalStorage
 if(fx){ document.getElementById('fx_rate').value=fx.toFixed(2); D.fx=fx; fxData.TWD=fx; }
 if(fx){ var fxIds=['t-fx','t-fx2']; fxIds.forEach(id=>{var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.textContent=fx.toFixed(2);el.className='t-up';}}); }
 if(stk){ document.getElementById('current_price').value=stk; D.cur=stk; }
 
 // 儲存陣列狀態並重新渲染畫面
 localStorage.setItem('wf_watch', JSON.stringify(watchlist));
 localStorage.setItem('wf_alerts', JSON.stringify(alertList));
 
 updateUI();
 renderWatch();
 updateHomeWatch();
 renderAlerts();
 
 icon.style.animation='';
 var n=new Date();
 document.getElementById('sync-time').textContent='最後更新 '+n.getHours()+':'+n.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2,'0');
 
 if(isSuccess) toast('✅ 市場數據已全面同步');
 else toast('部分連線不穩定，請稍後再試','var(--amber)');
}

// ===== 快照 =====
function takeSnapshot(){
 toast('📸 產生快照...');
 goPage('home',document.querySelector('.nav-btn'));
 setTimeout(()=>{
   if(typeof html2canvas==='undefined'){toast('快照功能載入中，請稍後再試','var(--amber)');return;}
   html2canvas(document.getElementById('page-home'),{backgroundColor:isLight?'#f4f7ff':'#07090f',scale:2,useCORS:true}).then(c=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.download='WinnerFlow_'+new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-TW').replace(/\//g,'-')+'.png';a.href=c.toDataURL('image/png');a.click();toast('✅ 快照已下載！');}).catch(()=>toast('快照失敗','var(--red)'));
 },400);
}

// ===== 初始化 =====
function init(){
 if('serviceWorker' in navigator)navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations().then(r=>r.forEach(x=>x.unregister()));
 try{var saved=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('wf_d'));if(saved){Object.assign(D,saved);document.getElementById('cost_price').value=D.cost;document.getElementById('current_price').value=D.cur;document.getElementById('shares').value=D.shares;document.getElementById('fx_rate').value=D.fx;document.getElementById('qqq_now').value=D.qqq;document.getElementById('transfer_ratio').value=D.ratio;document.getElementById('expected_return').value=D.ret;document.getElementById('years').value=D.yrs;}}catch(e){}
 
 updateUI();
 renderWatch();
 updateHomeWatch();
 renderAlerts();
 renderHist();
 
 // 延遲 0.5 秒後自動觸發第一次同步，避免阻塞主畫面繪製
 setTimeout(() => {
   syncMarket();
   loadNews();
 }, 500);
}
init();
// 關閉sheet點遮罩
document.querySelectorAll('.form-sheet').forEach(s=>{s.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===s)s.classList.remove('open');});});
</script>
</body>
</html>
